statement: In every magma, Equation 1973 (`x = (y * (z * x)) * (w * w)`) implies Equation 2445 (`x = (x * ((x * x) * y)) * z`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0844
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op z x)) (op w w))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op x (op (op x x) y)) z)
